title: Section 62A Planning Application: S62A/2025/0140 110 - 112 The assembly, East Street, Bedminster, Bristol, BS3 4EY
body: "Type of application:  Application for Planning Permission and for relevant demolition of an unlisted building in a conservation area  Applicant name:  TMT Capital Ltd  Site address:  110 - 112 The assembly, East Street, Bedminster, Bristol, BS3 4EY  Description of proposed development:  Demolition of the rear extensions and construction of a large HMO (Sui Generis). Change of use of the remaining ground floor unit from Public House to a commercial unit(Use Class E)  Case Officer:  Section 62A Applications Team  Procedure:   TBC  Key dates:      Date     Date application valid 8 December 2025   Date by when representations must be made 14 January 2026   Hearing date and venue TBC   Target Decision 2 February 2026   Decision date TBC     Hearing Documents  Decision  Make a representation  The application can be inspected under the application plans and documents heading below.  You will be able to comment on this application until 14 January 2026.  Please base your comments on planning matters.  Please avoid the use of inflammatory, discriminatory or abusive comments  All representations made in connection with the development proposal will be made publicly available on the website shortly after the end of the representation period.  The name of the individual author or organisation will be published however addresses, signatures and contact details will not be published.  We advise you not to include any other personal information about yourself or others. Our Customer Privacy Notice sets out how we handle personal data in accordance with the law.  Send your comments via email to  section62anonmajor@planninginspectorate.gov.uk  or write to Section 62A Applications Team, Planning Inspectorate, c/o QUADIENT, 69 Buckingham Avenue, Slough, SL1 4PN  Sending comments by email will enable us to deal with them more quickly.  Please include the application reference number S62A/2025/0140 and site address.  This application will be determined by an Inspector appointed by the Secretary of State.  Shortly after the close of the representation period the Planning Inspectorate will consider whether a hearing is necessary.   In the event that a hearing is scheduled, and you would wish to speak at the hearing, you must make this request at the time you submit your written representations.  Where the application is to be considered at a hearing, notice of the date, time and venue for the hearing along with the name of the person holding the hearing, will be published on this website at least one week before the date of the hearing.   Application Plans and Documents     Application Form  (PDF, 177 KB, 14 pages)  BNG Exemption Statement  (PDF, 256 KB, 3 pages)  CIL Form - PINS 2  (PDF, 3.72 MB, 6 pages)  Coal Mining Report  (PDF, 1.3 MB, 10 pages)  Cover Letter  (PDF, 5.78 MB, 71 pages)  Energy & Sustainability Statement - HMO 110-112 East St - R2  (PDF, 15 MB, 31 pages)  FRA Drainage and ST  (PDF, 7.27 MB, 25 pages)  Marketing Report - 110-112 East Street  (PDF, 930 KB, 6 pages)  2124 204 P1 Existing South West Elevation  (PDF, 55.6 KB, 1 page)  2124 211 P6 Proposed Ground and First Floor Plans  (PDF, 524 KB, 1 page)  2124 212 P5 Proposed Second...
